race.description: Tall Timbers Pony Club Midway Maiden Plate
race.comment: TITAN OF FURY (1) third-up for this and savaged the line strongly with a tough third over 1250m at Newcastle in a decent rating contest. Key jockey change today and can finish over the top of them. MOANA GOLD (5) is having her fourth start for the new yard with her hoof on the till. Finds a weaker test after resuming with a gritty third over 1100m at this track in a Super Maiden. Maps well again and gets every chance here. MRS MAREE (6) kept safe in betting first-up with a fading on-pace fifth over 1100m at Rosehill. Strips fitter for this and has the pace to overcome the sticky gate. Each-way. TIME TO DANCE (4) Savabeel gelding out of Donna Imelda on debut for the Bryce Heys stable. Has shown ability in his last two trials and Lloyd rides from the low gate. Must be kept safe.
